case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIS ENRIQUE BARAHONA LOBO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOBO, LUIS ENRIQUE BARAHONA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOBO, LUIS ENRIQUE BARAHONA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JUN-03-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOBO, LUIS ENRIQUE BARAHONA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUSI ENRIQUE BARAHONA LOBO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.
